    unit_eur: 24

Four purchase bills explicitly contained related_entity = Badger in their visible note content, and each was migrated to schema-compliant bill frontmatter per 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md with original body retained unchanged below frontmatter. Inbox file was then deleted per process-next-inbox-item and inbox-processing-v2-update workflows.
